title: SDE-2 at AI4LEX (Italy)
description: AI4LEX is a platform that provides AI-powered legal services. I worked as a Full-Stack Developer building scalable, production-grade applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Java Spring Boot.
role: At AI4LEX, I developed real-time features using WebSockets to enable live data synchronization across users and built AI-powered modules including RAG pipelines, contract analysis systems, and MCP-style AI servers. I designed and implemented Agentic AI workflows using LangChain and LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool orchestration, and stateful execution within applications. Additionally, I contributed to DevOps processes, leveraging Docker and CI/CD pipelines to ensure reliable, efficient deployment and scalable system architecture.

title: Full Stack Developer at Muzigal (Hyderabad)
description: Muzigal is a platform for music learning, where students can learn music from the best teachers. I worked as a full stack developer, developing the UI and seamlessly integrating backend APIs.
role: At Muzigal, I was entrusted with developing the UI and seamlessly integrating backend APIs. My responsibilities spanned crafting intuitive user interfaces while ensuring seamless connectivity with backend systems. Leveraging Node.js, I architected and implemented APIs to facilitate smooth communication between front-end and backend, ensuring a cohesive and efficient application experience for users.

title: Full Stack Developer at Edgroom Pvt Ltd (Vishakapatnam)
description: Edgroom is a startup company where students, teachers, and institutions can collaborate with each other. Edgroom provides EdNews, EdBlogs, EdForms and EdWebinars to drive user engagement.
role: Developed reusable UI React components for static interfaces, enabling efficient maintenance. Implemented client-side features for API interaction, facilitating dynamic content updates. Utilized Next.js Routing to enhance SEO, improving search engine visibility. Collaborated on optimization, achieving a 30% performance boost through efficient component usage and enhancements.
